title: oldenlandia laceyi
intro: Oldenlandia laceyi, also known as Laceyi's Blume or Laceyi's Oldenlandia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia laceyi include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Oldenlandia laceyi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
